view.title: Itikiti {id}
view.subject: Isihloko
view.emailDisabled: I-imeyili yakho ({email}) ikhubazile. Nceda uqhagamshelane ne
view.ipHelpText: Ukuba unxibelelwano luvela kwidilesi ye-IP ewahlukileyo. Nceda uyiguqule.
view.passwordEncrypted: Amagama okusebenzisa agciniwe kwisiseko sedatha esenziwe ibe yimfihlo.
view.ticketClosed: Le tikiti ivalwe, ngoko ke iimpendulo zikhubazile. Ukuba usafuna uncedo, zivumele ukuvula itikiti entsha kwaye siya kuvuya ukukunceda.
view.replyHint: Ukuvula iitikiti ewahlukileyo zeengxaki ezintsha kunceda iqela lethu ukubeka phambili kwaye ukuzixazulula ngokukhawuleza.

new.title: Itikiti entsha
new.subject: Isihloko
new.subjectValidation: Nceda ufake inkcazelo emfutshane malunga nengxaki.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: Enkosi ngokusinceda ukugcina inkqubo yenkxaso esebenza kakuhle ngokuthumela isicelo esinye ngeTikiti.
new.descriptionValidation: Nceda ufake inkcazelo engqalileyo malunga nengxaki.
new.fileNote: Qaphela: Kuphela iifayile zemifanekiso - iindidi ze-gif/jpeg/png ezivumelekileyo.
new.allowAccessLabel: Ndivumela InterServer ukungena kwiseva yam kwaye ndenze inguquko
new.accessNote: Nceda uqaphele: Ngokuvula isicelo senkxaso InterServer ingadinga ukungena, ukulungisa, okanye ukuguqula iifayile kwiakhawunti yakho. Le mfuneko ifuneka ukuze inikeze inkxaso yezobuchwephesha. Nceda uqhubeke kuphela ukuba uyavuma.
